hero.title: Riali r톖 k칛 IATF
hero.lead: 쿯n 톢칬칬 bi퍔 raan 톝 be퍔n mat thi퍔n lotd톝 ni퍔 du톖퍔톖퍔p mi퍔 g칬l, mi퍔 go퍔o퍔ri퍔 톢칬칬 deri퍔 l칛t k톝 t톝kn톖l톖ji퍔 mi퍔 lu칛kni퍔 naath, ki톝 deri퍔 ca퍔a퍔p ti퍔 d톖퍔콂 ti퍔 bi퍔 naath lu칛k k톝 l칛tni퍔k톝 ka퍔mraar, bi퍔 k톝 k톝 loc, bi k톝 톢톖퍔n, ki톝 bi퍔 k톝n k톝 tit k칛 ti퍔 k톖퍔ki톝n.

header.title: Ca퍔a퍔p tin dee naath r톖퍔톖퍔di톝n mat thi퍔n

items: Thie퍔c k톝 p칬r칬j톝k. Mi퍔 ci퍔 ji퍔n du톖퍔톖퍔r jek mi퍔 /ci퍔 r톖 de lu칛콂 k톝 riali퍔k칛 mi퍔 d톖퍔콂 der톝 ji퍔 lu칛k k톝 l칛thd톝 thi퍔n, j칛kni퍔 j톝 k칛 min g칬rk톝.
Th칢m k톝n톝 gu칛cd톝. Th톝m IATF pr칬jekni퍔 k톝 lu칛k tekin칬l칬ji퍔 min la퍔t k톝 ji퍔, l칛ri min l칛t k톝n톝 min /ci퍔 l칛t, k칛 l칛ri rik 톝 thi퍔a퍔k r톝y gua퍔th t톖퍔톖퍔w칛 min lot r톖 thi퍔n.
Lu톖퍔cd톝. L칛t tin caa ka퍔m raar k톝 thok Li콂li퍔thni퍔 caa k톝 g톖퍔a퍔r piny k톝 nhiam, k톝 k톖r k칛 mi퍔 ci퍔 n톝y ti퍔 k톖퍔ki톝n 톝 g톖퍔r thi퍔n, k톝 tukd톝 k톝 thok I퍔thp톝nyni퍔th.
Ta퍔thd톝. Mi퍔 ci퍔 ri톝k jiek k칛 IATF, ja퍔ki퍔 mi퍔 go퍔o퍔ri퍔 톢칬칬 bi퍔 du톖퍔톖퍔r ka퍔m ji퍔, ki톝 na콂ni퍔 pr칬jek 톝 la 톝njinieer in tek톝 lua퍔콂.
L칛thni j톝 thi퍔n. P칬r칬j톝kni퍔 tin te thi퍔n ni퍔 w칛n k칛 tha퍔a퍔콂 gua퍔thni퍔 laa go퍔o퍔rk톝 ram mi퍔 bi퍔 k톝 tit.

header.title: Gua퍔th tin l칛t IATF thi퍔n r톝y naath

items: GitHub. Th톝mni퍔, y톖퍔a퍔tni퍔 tin go퍔o퍔rk톝, tin ca ka퍔m raar, k톝n톝 tin ca g톖퍔r r톝y pr칬jek칛.
T칢칢 k톝 ti퍔 /ci퍔 r톖퍔 lot. Ruac mi퍔 t칢k, mat 콂톖aani퍔, k톝n톝 thie퍔e퍔c ti퍔 /ci퍔 r톖퍔 lot.
E-mai퍔l (E-mail) L칛td톝 contact@iatf.cc Mi퍔 /ci퍔 GitHub ki톝 Discord mat thi퍔n.

header.title: Thur톝 du톖퍔톖퍔r mi퍔 p칛칛r k톝 min go퍔o퍔ri퍔 i퍔 bi퍔 la퍔t thi퍔n

paragraphs: K톝n caani퍔칬li퍔 diaal caa k톝 la퍔th gua퍔a퍔th k톝l mi퍔 caa guic 톝 n톝y diaal k톝n톝 gua퍔th t톖퍔톖퍔w칛 콂톖aani퍔 diaal.
